tasks.label: Sphinx LiveHTML (Docker)
tasks.command: docker run --rm -v "${workspaceFolder}:/work" -w /work -p 8000:8000 python:3.9-slim bash -c 'pip install -r requirements.txt && sphinx-autobuild --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 ./source ./build/_html'
tasks.detail: Docker経由でsphinx-autobuildを起動し、http://localhost:8000 でライブプレビュー

tasks.label: Maven RST生成 (Docker)
tasks.command: docker run --rm -v "${workspaceFolder}:/project" -w /project/tools/actionlist maven:3.6.2-jdk-11 mvn clean install -DskipTests
tasks.detail: Docker経由でMavenを実行し、source/auto/ にactionlist RSTを生成
